creator: marka@isc.org
text:
https connections stall after the TCP 3 way handshake.
	This is not all https connections but once it starts
	it does not correct itself.  Plain http connections
	continue to work.  It initially appeared to be that
	pages with flash triggered this but I've had it happen
	without toughing a page with flash.

How-To-Repeat: 
	https://www.isc.org (works initially)
	goto www.commbank.com.au
	click on netbank  (fails)
	try to go back to https://www.isc.org or
	any other https site and it fails
	plain https sites continue to work.
